user.label: Navigation related to your user account

footer.disclaimer: MBO is unofficial Fan Content permitted under the {fcp}. Not approved/endorsed by Wizards. Portions of the materials used are property of Wizards of the Coast. © Wizards of the Coast LLC.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.claim: Keep your collection of magic cards organized.
welcome.intro: While building a new deck, you want to add a specific card. You know that you own the card - somewhere in your 10+ binders/boxes/whatever. After searching for half an hour, you give up and buy a new copy. Sounds familiar? MBO is for you.

oracle.title: Oracle Cards
oracle.explanation: One card for each Oracle ID. The chosen sets for the cards are an attempt to return the most up-to-date recognizable version of the card.

default.title: Default Cards
default.explanation: Every card in English or the printed language if the card is only available in one language.

sets.title: Sets
sets.explanation: Every set, including many un-official sets as a way to group promotional or outlier cards together.

register.title: Registration
register.intro: After registering, we will send you a link to verify your e-mail address. You can login after verifying your e-mail address.

login.title: Login
login.nav_label: If you can't login, use these links.

forgot.title: Can't login?
forgot.intro: If you can't access your user account, we can send you either your user name or a link that resets your password. Simply select either password or user name, and provide your e-mail address. If you have forgotten the password, you will also need to enter your username.

reset_password.title: Reset password
reset_password.intro: Enter your new password. After saving you can login using your new password.

resend_verification.title: Resend verification link
resend_verification.intro: If your verification link has expired, you can request a new link to verify your e-mail-address. Please supply the e-mail address and the username.

password.headline: Change Password
password.intro: You can change your password by entering the current password and the new password.

profile.headline: Update Profile
profile.intro: You can change your E-Mail address and/or your username. If you update either, you will be logged out and need to login with the new data. If you update the E-Mail address, you will need to verify it by clicking on the link that we send you.

two_factor.headline: Two-Factor authentication
two_factor.intro: Two-factor authentication uses a {totp}. You will need an appropriate app, like Google/Microsoft Authenticator or {tool1} / {tool2}.
two_factor.requires_confirmation: To activate, you need to provide your password.

setup.title: Setup Two-Factor Authentication
setup.explanation: finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code in your authenticator app, or enter the code manually.

verification.title: Confirm 2FA
verification.explanation: Enter the one-time password from your app and click on 'Confirm'.

recovery_codes.headline: Recovery Codes
recovery_codes.explanation: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
recovery_codes.label: Recovery codes

regenerate_codes.explanation: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, use the button 'Regenerate Codes'

disable_section.headline: Disable Two-Factor Authentication
disable_section.explanation: Enter your password to disable two-factor authentication.

deletion.title: Delete user account
deletion.explanation: If needed, you can delete your user account. {caution} - this action deletes everything associated with your user account, including your collection and decks.
deletion.no_soft_deletes: We do not use {soft_deletes}, the account is deleted forever.
deletion.reversed: This action can not be reversed, we can't restore a deleted user account.

modal.title: Confirm deletion
modal.explanation: Are you sure you want to delete your user account permanently?

legend.required: Fields marked with a {icon} are required.
legend.password: When entering your password, we check if the password is secure enough. Insecure passwords are rejected.
legend.2fa: Your account has enabled two-factor authentication. Please check your app for a one-time password, or use a recovery code to login.
